//: OGR gateway policy — the deployer owns this. Composition picks how vendor verdicts combine; the detector blocks tell each reference detector what to enforce. The SAME policy model is used at the agent-hook and sandbox altitudes; only the bindings differ.

content_rules.//: Gateway altitude: inspect the raw messages on the wire (model_input) and the completion (model_output).

config_rules.//: Reused as-is from the core reference detector — judges any tool_call carried in the request, identical to the agent-hook altitude.

command_rules.why: remote script fetched and piped directly into a shell
destructive recursive delete of filesystem root
